name: Amazon sellers processing 10–50 contracts/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 contracts/month, missed contract renewal deadlines cause supplier penalties. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Missed contract renewal deadlines leading to penalties and disrupted supply chains.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Missed contract renewal deadlines leading to penalties and disrupted supply chains.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 contracts/month, missed contract renewal deadlines cause supplier penalties. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of contract dates using spreadsheets or calendars.

one_liner: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 contracts/month, missed contract renewal deadlines cause supplier penalties. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking.
